creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
since one of the last portupgrades I cannot use
kdegraphics-kuickshow-3.5.10_3 (graphics/kuickshow). The images are viewed 
destroyed or "disordered". I guess the bug is in one of the dependend libs/ports.

see: http://www.tsdh.de/~rotkap/kuickshow1.png

It wreckes all types (.bmp, .gif, .jpg).


I did a "make clean" and a "make distclean" on graphics/kuickshow und reinstalled the port - doas not help


The images are ok - other image viewing software doas it well.

How-To-Repeat: just use kdegraphics-kuickshow-3.5.10_3 with alls ports up to date
